data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the cancellation window tracking or the application of penalties for cancellations within 48 hours. Although the linked use case mentions the penalty, it lacks concrete evidence of the system's ability to enforce this requirement. Therefore, the validation of the scenario behavior remains inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence of cancellation tracking or penalty enforcement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
